---
pagetitle: "News"
title: "News"

listing: 
  contents:
    - "**/index.qmd"
  type: default
  #grid-columns: 2
  fields: [title, image, description]
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: false
  #image-height: 400px
#header-includes: >
  #<link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/listing-default.css">
 # <link rel="" href="../assets/custom-css.js"> 
#resources:
 # - ../assets/listing-default.css
 # - ../assets/custom-css.js
---
